phases.title: Project Bootstrap, `gwrk init`, `gwrk new`

tasks.title: Implement package.json
tasks.description: NEW: Project manifest — commander, zod, vitest, biome, tsx

tasks.title: Implement tsconfig.json
tasks.description: NEW: ES2022 target, ESM, strict mode, NodeNext module resolution

tasks.title: Implement biome.json
tasks.description: NEW: Lint + format config, no `any` allowed

tasks.title: Implement .gitignore
tasks.description: MODIFY: Add `dist/`, `node_modules/`

tasks.title: Implement src/cli.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Commander program definition, version, top-level command routing

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/init.ts
tasks.description: NEW: `gwrk init` — scaffold directories, detect CLIs, provision context files, create Slack channel, register in SQLite

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/new.ts
tasks.description: NEW: `gwrk new <name>` — mkdir, git init, gh repo create, then delegates to init

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/config.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Zod schema for `.gwrkrc.json`, fail-fast loader

tasks.title: Implement src/db/index.ts
tasks.description: NEW: SQLite connection to `~/.gwrk/gwrk.db`, schema init via migrations

tasks.title: Implement src/db/migrations/001-initial.sql
tasks.description: NEW: Create tables: projects, tasks, task_types, runs, compression, history

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/exec.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Shell command execution wrapper via `child_process.execFile`

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 1
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `pnpm install` exits 0
`pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` exits 0
`node --import tsx src/cli.ts --help` prints commands including `init`
`node --import tsx src/cli.ts init` creates scaffold directories in a temp dir
`pnpm test` passes TR-001 and TR-008

phases.title: Agent Dispatch Commands

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/specify.ts
tasks.description: NEW: `gwrk specify <prompt>` — dispatches agent with `/specify` workflow

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/plan.ts
tasks.description: NEW: `gwrk plan <feature>` — dispatches agent with `/plan` workflow

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/analyze.ts
tasks.description: NEW: `gwrk analyze <feature>` — dispatches agent with `/analyze` workflow

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/effort.ts
tasks.description: NEW: `gwrk effort <feature>` — dispatches agent with `/effort` workflow

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/agent.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Agent dispatch abstraction — resolves backend from config, builds CLI args, invokes via `exec.ts`

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 2
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `node --import tsx src/cli.ts specify "test feature"` spawns the configured agent process
`node --import tsx src/cli.ts plan 001-cli-core` spawns the agent with correct workflow
`pnpm test` passes TR-002, TR-003, TR-009, TR-010

phases.title: Task Engine — State, Gates & History

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/tasks.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Commander subcommands — `generate`, `list`, `next`, `done`

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/state.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Read/write task state via SQLite, atomic operations, export to tasks.json

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/parser.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Parse plan.md → extract phases and tasks

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/gate-gen.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Generate `gates/T0xx-gate.sh` from plan task assertions

tasks.title: Implement src/utils/history.ts
tasks.description: NEW: Insert into SQLite `history` table on every state transition

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 3
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `node --import tsx src/cli.ts tasks generate 001-cli-core` creates `specs/001-cli-core/.gwrk/tasks.json` and `specs/001-cli-core/gates/T*-gate.sh`
`jq '.phases | length' specs/001-cli-core/.gwrk/tasks.json` returns ≥ 1
`ls specs/001-cli-core/gates/T*-gate.sh | wc -l` matches task count
Gate files have `+x` permission: `test -x specs/001-cli-core/gates/T001-gate.sh`
`node --import tsx src/cli.ts tasks done 001-cli-core T001` with a failing gate exits 1
`node --import tsx src/cli.ts tasks done 001-cli-core T001` with a passing gate exits 0 and updates tasks.json
`tail -1 .gwrk/history.jsonl | jq -r '.taskId'` outputs `T001`
`pnpm test` passes TR-004, TR-006, TR-007

phases.title: Task Query Commands

tasks.title: Implement src/commands/tasks.ts
tasks.description: MODIFY: Add `list` and `next` subcommands with `--json` output

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 4
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `node --import tsx src/cli.ts tasks list 001-cli-core --json | jq '.tasks | length'` returns task count
`node --import tsx src/cli.ts tasks next 001-cli-core 1 --json | jq -r '.id'` returns a task ID
`pnpm test` passes TR-005, VR-001, VR-002, VR-003
All tests pass: `pnpm test` exits 0
